meaning: n.墨棒,油墨轮,电信用打字机
examples: Inker was someone who adopted a new kind of individual printing model.
The inker automatically Get empty to turn device, prevent ink from being dried .
The inker automatically breaks away from surface to protect printing plate from damage in case of mechanical shutdown.
Ben Inker, chief of the asset allocation group at GMO recently shared this outlook for euro zone stocks.
